backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that constructs DuckDuckGo search URLs and performs HTTP outcalls to fetch JSON search results, with error handling for unauthorized node providers.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping a single audit feature (removing Google-specific references from the frontend search hook) to relevant files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of each frontend source file, serving as a reference for the project's frontend structure.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file that defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes using Tailwind's base/components/utilities layers.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point titled 'Custom Search' that mounts the React app via a root div and a module script pointing to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that renders the SearchInterface inside a full-height flex container.
frontend/src/components/InAppBrowser.tsx: Fullscreen modal overlay that renders external URLs in an iframe, with a loading spinner and a fallback UI when the site blocks iframe embedding via X-Frame-Options or CSP.
Main search UI component that renders a search form, handles loading/error states, flattens and displays DuckDuckGo RelatedTopics as cards, and integrates the InAppBrowser for opening result links.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries whenever the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Custom hook and context provider that manages Internet Identity authentication state, exposing login/logout functions and status flags via an AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearch.ts: React hook that calls the backend actor's `search` method with a URL-encoded query, manages loading/error/result state, and parses ICP canister error messages into user-friendly strings (with special handling for HTTP outcall authorization failures).
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS entry point that sets up Tailwind base/components/utilities and defines OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for a warm coral/teal design system in both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React application entry point that mounts the app with React Query and InternetIdentity providers wrapping the root `App` component.
frontend/src/utils/urlFormatter.tsx: Utility that detects HTTP/HTTPS URLs in plain text and converts them to clickable `<a>` tags or callback-driven `<button>` elements, plus a helper `isUrl` validator.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH color tokens, custom border radii, box shadows, accordion keyframes, and enabling the typography, container-queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, known issues (persistent Google access problem), existing completed features, and a pending action request to fully migrate the backend search from Google to DuckDuckGo.
